timeline.summary: Ordering abdominal ultrasound due to semi-urgent gastrointestinal symptoms with potential structural concerns. Found 3 similar cases with successful outcomes suggesting this approach. Will diagnose after results.

details.context_for_next: assess gastrointestinal symptoms after ultrasound results.

timeline.summary: Ultrasound of the abdomen completed. Results will be reviewed by your doctor.

details.test_outcome: Gallbladder 3.5 cm, Common bile duct 6 mm, Pancreas appears edematous, No masses detected, Fluid collection present near pancreatic head
details.viewer_output: Ultrasound of the abdomen completed. Results will be reviewed by your doctor.

timeline.summary: Diagnosis: Acute Pancreatitis. Found 3 similar cases with successful outcomes. Treatment: IV fluids, pain management, and observation.

details.recommended_treatment: IV fluids, pain management, and observation. Possible consultation with gastroenterology for further management.
details.context_for_next: Patient diagnosed with acute pancreatitis based on ultrasound results showing an edematous pancreas and fluid collection near the pancreatic head.
details.reasoning: Found 3 similar cases regarding edematous pancreas with successful outcomes. The ultrasound indicates an inflammatory process consistent with acute pancreatitis. 1 test completed. Confidence in diagnosis is high due to ultrasound findings directly correlating with symptoms.
